Creator.Title: Portrait Sprite Creator
Creator.BodyFrameHint: Define the rectangle for the full body sprite.
Creator.PreviewHint: Preview shows the original image at its natural aspect ratio, with the body box in red, the head grid box in pink, and expression frames in cyan.
Creator.PreviewPlaceholder: Select a spritesheet to preview the grid.

Errors.MissingSpritesheet: Select a spritesheet before creating a sprite.

Creator.ImageDimensionsUnknown: Original image dimensions unavailable until a spritesheet is loaded.
Creator.FinalPreviewHint: Cycles through expressions once per second using the current body, head grid, and head offset settings.
Creator.MagnifierHint: Move over the final preview to inspect pixels; use the mouse wheel to adjust zoom.
